raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "prescribes an ongoing behavioral practice of self-monitoring and accountability",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "wrongs can be reliably detected through personal inventory",
    "prompt admission of wrongs is feasible and advisable",
    "such admission produces positive outcomes"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a concise prescriptive rule linking continuous assessment to immediate corrective action",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the practitioner must be capable of reasonably accurate self-assessment and the social context must reward timely admissions rather than punish them",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is treated as guaranteeing moral clarity or automatic resolution of conflicts when self-perception is distorted or power imbalances exist"
}

implicit_claims: wrongs can be reliably detected through personal inventory
